rationale: In the citing paper, Sonnier and Ainslie (2011) appears only as one item in a grouped background citation supporting the general claim that favorable brand personality can increase willingness to pay. The paper does not return to this source for theory development, hypothesis logic specific to that study, measurement choices, or interpretation of results. Because the citation serves as broad prior evidence rather than a distinct building block in the argument, its role is a passing background mention.
